title: Collect and classify plants
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Collect and classify plants demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for plant collecting

pcs.text: Confirm purpose and objectives for collecting a range of plants
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm purpose and objectives for collecting a range of plants?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm purpose and objectives for collecting a range of plants.

pcs.text: Define area, location and habitat for collecting
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define area, location and habitat for collecting?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define area, location and habitat for collecting.

pcs.text: Determine and prepare resources to assist in locating and identifying plants
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and prepare resources to assist in locating and identifying plants?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and prepare resources to assist in locating and identifying plants.

pcs.text: Determine and prepare equipment required for collecting and preserving specimens
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and prepare equipment required for collecting and preserving specimens?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and prepare equipment required for collecting and preserving specimens.

pcs.text: Obtain licences or permission to collect specimens from landowner or managing agency
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain licences or permission to collect specimens from landowner or managing agency?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain licences or permission to collect specimens from landowner or managing agency.

pcs.text: Assess range of likely operating conditions, hazards and difficult or sensitive environments for impact on collecting and preserving specimens
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess range of likely operating conditions, hazards and difficult or sensitive environments for impact on collecting and preserving specimens?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess range of likely operating conditions, hazards and difficult or sensitive environments for impact on collecting and preserving specimens.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards associated with plant collecting, assess risks and implement controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards associated with plant collecting, assess risks and implement controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards associated with plant collecting, assess risks and implement controls.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for plant collecting

elements.title: Collect plant specimens

pcs.text: Observe collection ethics when selecting specimens for picking
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe collection ethics when selecting specimens for picking?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe collection ethics when selecting specimens for picking.

pcs.text: Enter into a field note book relevant information about the specimen, its characteristics and occurrence, and note location coordinates
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Enter into a field note book relevant information about the specimen, its characteristics and occurrence, and note location coordinates?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Enter into a field note book relevant information about the specimen, its characteristics and occurrence, and note location coordinates.

pcs.text: Confirm specimen collected provides adequate material for identification and preserving
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm specimen collected provides adequate material for identification and preserving?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm specimen collected provides adequate material for identification and preserving.

pcs.text: Tag and store specimens for later identification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Tag and store specimens for later identification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Tag and store specimens for later identification.

pcs.text: Follow appropriate work health and safety requirements and work practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow appropriate work health and safety requirements and work practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow appropriate work health and safety requirements and work practices.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Collect plant specimens

elements.title: Preserve specimens

pcs.text: Preserve specimen while still fresh
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Preserve specimen while still fresh?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Preserve specimen while still fresh.

pcs.text: Clean and prepare specimen for preserving
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and prepare specimen for preserving?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and prepare specimen for preserving.

pcs.text: Preserve specimen using either pressing or drying techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Preserve specimen using either pressing or drying techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Preserve specimen using either pressing or drying techniques.

pcs.text: Mount dried specimen and label with information from note book
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Mount dried specimen and label with information from note book?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Mount dried specimen and label with information from note book.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Preserve specimens

elements.title: Identify plant specimen

pcs.text: Use relevant plant key to identify plant
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use relevant plant key to identify plant?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use relevant plant key to identify plant.

pcs.text: Identify and document basic characteristics of a plant
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and document basic characteristics of a plant?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and document basic characteristics of a plant.

pcs.text: Confirm plant identity against botanical description of species
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm plant identity against botanical description of species?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm plant identity against botanical description of species.

pcs.text: Document plant identity on label according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document plant identity on label according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document plant identity on label according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Identify plant specimen

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
